subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is the last Branch which Thou hast caused to spring forth from the Tree that hath yielded the fruit of recognition of the Manifestation of Thy supreme Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی هذا غصن آخر الذی انشعبته من سدره التی اثمرت بعرفان مظهر نفسک العلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
